# Creek

> Open-source edge deployment platform. Deploy to Cloudflare Workers in seconds. No account required.

## Quick Start

```
npx creek deploy --demo
```

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://creek.dev/docs/getting-started) — Deploy your first site in 60 seconds
- [CLI Reference](https://creek.dev/docs/cli) — All commands and flags
- [HTTP API](https://creek.dev/docs/api) — Sandbox deploy API for agents and CI/CD
- [MCP Server](https://creek.dev/docs/mcp) — AI agent integration via Model Context Protocol

## Frameworks

- [React](https://creek.dev/docs/frameworks/react) — Vite + React deployment
- [Next.js](https://creek.dev/docs/frameworks/nextjs) — Static export deployment
- [Vue](https://creek.dev/docs/frameworks/vue) — Vite + Vue deployment
- [Svelte](https://creek.dev/docs/frameworks/svelte) — Vite + Svelte deployment
- [Astro](https://creek.dev/docs/frameworks/astro) — Astro static site deployment

## API Endpoints

- Deploy: `POST https://sandbox-api.creek.dev/api/sandbox/deploy`
- Status: `GET https://sandbox-api.creek.dev/api/sandbox/:id/status`
- MCP: `https://mcp.creek.dev/mcp`

## Source Code

- [GitHub](https://github.com/solcreek/creek) — Apache 2.0
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/creek) — `creek@alpha`
